bag1.title: BOXING BAG - H2O - 22 INCH - 65KG FILLED
description: Developed for Intermediate Boxers – Perfect for fighters leveling up their skills
Multi-Purpose Design – Ideal for all types of boxing training
Mesh Breather Pillow Palms – Enhanced ventilation keeps hands cooler and drier
Premium Leather Outer with Black Carbon Fibre Enduro Palm & Wrist
Turned-In, Padded Thumb Design – Adds extra protection
Relaxed Fit with Easy Hand Entry

bag2.title: BOXING BAG - H2O - 18 INCH - 50KG FILLED
description: The Water Filled Punching Bag is designed to deliver a realistic, heavy-bag training experience while remaining practical for both commercial gyms and home setups.
Simply fill the durable outer shell with water to create a stable, high-performance punching bag weighing over 50kg, then empty it whenever you need to transport or store it.
Built with a commercial-grade 3.5mm wall membrane and a durable black finish.
Heavy-duty chain and shackle included.
Includes all accessories and tools required for setup.
Available in three sizes.

bag4.title: BOXING BAG - EMPTY CASING - Trophy Getters - 5ft - BLK
description: Built for serious boxing training, this heavy-duty refillable boxing bag delivers outstanding durability and long-term value for both home and commercial gyms.
Supplied unfilled, the bag can be packed with your preferred filling material to reach approximately 50kg, allowing you to customise the feel and firmness to suit your training style.
Constructed from extra heavy-duty laminated ripstop tarpaulin with reinforced stitching, it is engineered to withstand years of intense bag work while maintaining its shape and performance.
The unique patent-pending refill lid provides quick and easy access whenever the bag needs topping up, making maintenance simple and extending the life of your equipment.
Complete with heavy-duty support hooks and backed by a 2-year AAA Grade commercial warranty, this boxing bag is built for athletes who demand reliable, professional-grade training equipment.

Features extra heavy-duty laminated ripstop tarpaulin construction, reinforced stitching, patent-pending easy-access refill lid, refillable design, approximately 50kg when filled, heavy-duty hanging hooks, commercial-grade durability, freight-free delivery and a 2-year AAA Grade manufacturers warranty.

gloves1.title: BOXING GLOVES - Mexican ELITE - 16oz - YELLOW
description: Designed for serious boxers, these Mexican-style sparring gloves deliver exceptional balance, protection and precision for every training session.
Built with premium extra-thick cowhide leather and authentic Mexican glove shaping, they provide a natural fist position, superior feedback and outstanding durability.
Hand-cut latex and injected mould padding ensure true-to-weight performance, while the specialist turned-in thumb design offers the snug, secure fit experienced fighters expect.
A luxurious moisture-wicking taffeta lining keeps your hands comfortable during long sessions, and the extra-wide hook and loop wrist strap provides outstanding wrist support and stability.
Perfect for boxing sparring and technical drills, these gloves are engineered for athletes training between one and five times per week.

Features authentic Mexican glove shaping, premium cowhide leather construction, hand-cut latex and injected mould padding, specialist turned-in thumb design, sewn-in reinforced thumb protection, moisture-wicking taffeta lining, 3-inch full-wrap hook and loop wrist closure, and a 2-year recreational and commercial use warranty.

gloves5.title: BOXING GLOVES - Trophy Getters - 16oz
description: The Trophy Getter® Boxing Gloves have earned their legendary reputation through more than 35 years of proven performance, making them a trusted choice for gyms, coaches, professional fighters and beginners alike.
Designed for bag work, pad work, sparring and boxing drills, these premium leather gloves deliver outstanding comfort, durability and protection through every stage of your training.

Featuring Punchtex® sweat-proof palms, vacuum-fit handmade construction and crush-tested 3-tonne memory injected moulded padding, they provide exceptional shock absorption, a secure fit and long-lasting performance.

The 3-inch full-wrap hook and loop wrist strap offers excellent wrist support, while the fitness-to-commercial grade construction is built to withstand years of regular use in both home and commercial gyms.

Available in six different weights and a wide range of colours, these gloves are engineered for athletes training between one and five times per week and are backed by a 2-year recreational and commercial warranty.

Features premium leather construction, Punchtex® sweat-proof palms, handmade vacuum-fit design, crush-tested 3-tonne memory injected moulded padding, 3-inch full-wrap hook and loop wrist closure, available in 8oz, 10oz, 12oz, 14oz, 16oz and 18oz, multiple colour options, commercial-grade durability, and over 35 years of proven boxing innovation.

gloves9.title: BOXING GLOVES - Armadillo SAFETY - 16oz
description: Built for professional boxing coaches and athletes, these precision focus pads are designed to develop faster hands, sharper accuracy and cleaner punching combinations.
Their lightweight construction allows for quick movement and effortless pad positioning, making them ideal for high-tempo boxing drills and technical training sessions.

The small scalloped target area encourages precise punch placement, while the unique sweet spot palm cavity provides excellent feedback to both the coach and the boxer for more effective skill development.

Constructed from premium full-grain leather, these focus pads deliver outstanding durability and a responsive striking feel, while the full hook and loop wrist straps provide a secure, comfortable fit throughout every session.
Perfect for precision pad work, speed drills and advanced boxing combinations, these pads are engineered to withstand regular gym use and are backed by a 2-year AAA Grade manufacturing warranty.

Features lightweight construction, precision scalloped striking target, sweet spot palm cavity, premium full leather casing, full hook and loop wrist straps, exceptional punch feedback, professional-grade durability and a 2-year AAA Grade manufacturing warranty.

pads1.title: FOCUS PADS - Mexican™ ULTRA AIR - BLACK
description: Engineered for maximum protection and confidence in the ring, these premium sparring gloves are designed for boxing, kickboxing and Muay Thai athletes who demand professional-level performance.

Built from genuine cowhide leather and featuring exclusive 6cm Armadillo™ injected padding, they deliver exceptional shock absorption to help protect both you and your training partners during hard sparring sessions.

Version 30 technology incorporates over 30 years of glove development, providing an advanced ergonomic hand fit, while the injected Mexican-style turned-in thumb offers superior comfort and added injury prevention.

The heavy-duty 3-inch full-wrap hook and loop wrist strap provides outstanding wrist stability, and the pillow palm construction creates a naturally secure fist position for maximum comfort throughout every session.
Designed for athletes training up to five times per week, these gloves are built for long-lasting commercial use and backed by a 2-year AAA Label warranty.

Features genuine cowhide leather construction, exclusive 6cm Armadillo™ injected knuckle padding, Version 30 ergonomic hand fit, injected Mexican-style thumb protection, pillow palm design, heavy-duty 3-inch full-wrap hook and loop wrist support, available in 12oz and 16oz options, and a 2-year AAA Label commercial warranty.
